status: I love painting so much  because i think  life is also like a canvas . Whatever we should draw, it will appear the same. If we have done any mistake we can color it again but if we  torn the mistake one it will get us nothing . We r human beings , so we must have mistakes in our life , but if we color it again with the appropriate color we can get a colorful canvas as well as a right destination ... (Munira Mahmud Mitu)
